content.body: what is our policy on test262 tests generated with LLMs? looks like the first test262 PR openly using one has just come in
it's not huge and at first glance seems useful, so I'm not concerned about slop in this case
I'm willing to review it, in other words
but I don't want to do so if there is some copyright concern within ECMA that overrides me 😄
If it's the zip one it is not actually good
The existing tests cover what it claims not to be testing
I think a policy of blindly rejecting LLM PRs from randoms will save time for everyone
